reviews.comment:
Debe ser la estacion de servicio con la vista mas linda, pero el menu para comer es basico. Y precios excesivos.

(Translated by Google)
It must be the gas station with the prettiest view, but the food menu is basic. And the prices are outrageous.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VOanVuYVdRczRuYURREAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención y predisposición del señor que despacha el combustible. Un placer.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and helpfulness from the man who delivers the fuel. A pleasure.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURvMGVtQTR3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Pasamos con el micro de las excursiones a pedir agua caliente y comprar algo para comer, la señora que atiende una mala onda, decía que a los del micro no nos podía cobrar con tarjeta de débito tenía que ser solo efectivo, cuando dos minutos atrás le cobró a unos chicos con tarjeta. Eso no es legal, no pueden negarle un método de pago a una persona porque es de un micro de excursiones, malísima atención 👎🏻

(Translated by Google)
We stopped by on the tour bus to get hot water and something to eat. The woman serving us was incredibly rude. She said she couldn't accept debit cards from tour bus passengers; it had to be cash only. Just two minutes before, she had accepted a card payment from some other kids. That's not legal. They can't deny someone a payment method just because they're on a tour bus. Terrible service! 👎🏻
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNvbDllcmtnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pase al medio dia y no había nadie que te atiendan, me tuve que ir sin llenar el tanque 🙂‍↕️

(Translated by Google)
I went by at midday and there was no one to help, I had to leave without filling up the tank 🙂‍↕️

reviewReply.comment: Sr. Perales, la estación en esta época está abierta de 08.00 a 20.00. Ante alguna eventualidad el playero podría estar en otro sector (depósito, baños, oficina...) y el Servicompras también está abierto.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNvaFpLV0N3EAE

reviews.comment:
Una de las estaciones del ACA con el entorno más lindo que podría tener, frente al lago mascardi sobre la ruta 40. Excelente atención del playero y de la señora que atiende adentro en el café. Dan ganas de quedarse ahi

(Translated by Google)
One of the ACA stations with the most beautiful setting it could possibly have, facing Lake Mascardi on Route 40. Excellent service from the waiter and the woman who serves inside the cafe. It makes you want to stay there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNJa2ZpdEhREAE
